items.title: Purdue Hits 2 Grand Slams in 16-Run Outburst at MSU
Boilers Even the Series with 13-6 Win Over Michigan
items.summary: Purdue (25-9, 5-3 Big Ten) used a six-run fifth inning and a 15-hit performance to power past Michigan (20-13, 1-7 Big Ten), 13–6, on Saturday afternoon at Hutchins Stadium.
